ui.behaviors_can_serve_multiple_function: Ziaza nih hnatuannak tampi a tuah khawh. Na hypothesis dontatnak hlanah zeitikpaoh data a tlawm lo in chuah (ABC lutnak 10+). Data-thawngin fehter awkah AI Pattern Hlathlainak tool hmang.

ui.click_ai_generate_checklist_to_create: BIP cungah aṭha in item siam awkah "AI Generate Checklist" click
ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel: "Load Student Workspaces" click i BehaviorLens in khoel cia .json file tampi thim

ui.document_whether_interventions_are_im: Intervention hna cu siam ningin tuah a si maw a si lo timi cazin tuah
ui.enter_data_or_record_sessions_to_gene: Khawm bunmi record siam awkah data lutter asiloah session khumh.
ui.family_voices_are_powerful_share_your: Chungkhar aw cu thazang a ngei. Na hmasa bik zohnak chimh!

ui.need_at_least_5_abc_entries_for_patte: Pattern hlathlainak caah ABC lutnak a tlawm bik 5 a herh.
